complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the repository setup into: 1) Create directory structure with all required folders, 2) Initialize Python package files (__init__.py), 3) Configure pyproject.toml with basic metadata, 4) Initialize git repository with .gitignore and README
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Straightforward file system operations with clear requirements. Low complexity but benefits from organized subtasks for systematic setup.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Research and specify core dependencies (docling, langchain) with version constraints, 2) Configure development dependencies (pytest, linting tools), 3) Set up build system configuration and entry points in pyproject.toml
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity due to dependency management and potential version conflicts. Requires understanding of package ecosystem.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Design configuration dataclass structure with all required fields, 2) Implement environment variable loading and validation, 3) Create configuration file parsing logic, 4) Add configuration validation and error handling
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity involving design decisions for configuration architecture, validation logic, and environment integration.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Design abstract base class interface and method signatures, 2) Implement common initialization and configuration handling, 3) Add shared utility methods for file validation, 4) Create error handling patterns and logging setup, 5) Add comprehensive type hints and documentation
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Higher complexity due to abstract design requiring careful interface planning that will affect all future pipeline implementations.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Design chunk consolidation algorithm and data structures, 2) Implement chunk size analysis and threshold detection, 3) Create merge logic for adjacent chunks, 4) Add optimization for balanced chunk sizes, 5) Implement edge case handling (boundary chunks), 6) Add comprehensive testing and validation
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity algorithm requiring careful optimization, edge case handling, and ensuring no data loss during consolidation.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Set up PDF pipeline class structure inheriting from BasePipeline, 2) Configure Docling PDF format options for table recognition, 3) Implement PDF preprocessing and metadata extraction, 4) Integrate HybridChunker for semantic chunking, 5) Add OCR handling for scanned PDFs, 6) Integrate chunk consolidation utility, 7) Implement comprehensive error handling and progress tracking
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to PDF format variability, table recognition requirements, OCR integration, and multiple processing steps.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Create HTML pipeline class inheriting from BasePipeline, 2) Configure Docling HTML converter with structure preservation, 3) Implement HTML parsing with encoding support, 4) Add link and media reference extraction, 5) Integrate chunk consolidation and error handling
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity due to HTML parsing challenges, structure preservation requirements, and handling malformed documents.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Implement extension-based detection with case-insensitive mapping, 2) Add MIME type validation as fallback detection method, 3) Create file validation and error handling for unsupported formats
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate complexity involving file system operations and format detection logic, but relatively straightforward implementation.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Set up Typer CLI application structure with argument parsing, 2) Implement file validation and format detection integration, 3) Add pipeline selection and instantiation logic, 4) Create progress indicators and user feedback systems, 5) Implement comprehensive error handling and user-friendly messages
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity due to CLI framework integration, user experience considerations, and orchestrating multiple components.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Design output directory structure and file naming conventions, 2) Implement markdown file generation with metadata headers, 3) Create index file generation with chunk summaries, 4) Add file conflict resolution and output format options
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity involving file I/O operations, directory management, and output formatting decisions.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Add Comprehensive Error Handling and Logging
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Design custom exception hierarchy for different error types, 2) Implement structured logging configuration with multiple levels, 3) Add error recovery mechanisms where possible, 4) Create performance and memory monitoring, 5) Integrate logging throughout all existing modules
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity requiring systematic integration across all modules and careful error handling design.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Set up LangChain integration and LLM client configuration, 2) Design and implement system prompt templates, 3) Create content formatting for LLM input processing, 4) Implement response parsing and validation logic, 5) Add local LLM endpoint configuration (Ollama/vLLM), 6) Create fallback mechanisms and error handling
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity due to LLM integration, prompt engineering, external service dependencies, and response handling.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Add --refine flag to CLI with proper option configuration, 2) Implement conditional workflow logic for normal vs refined processing, 3) Integrate LLM refiner module with progress tracking, 4) Add configuration validation and graceful degradation handling
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Medium complexity involving CLI enhancement, workflow modification, and integration with LLM module.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Create unit tests for core utilities and configuration modules, 2) Implement pipeline-specific unit tests with mock data, 3) Develop integration tests for complete workflows, 4) Create CLI testing suite with various scenarios, 5) Add performance tests for large files, 6) Implement LLM integration tests with mocked responses, 7) Set up coverage reporting and CI configuration
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: High complexity requiring comprehensive test coverage across multiple modules, mock data creation, and testing framework setup.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Create comprehensive README with installation and usage instructions, 2) Generate API documentation and configuration guides, 3) Write troubleshooting guide and example scenarios, 4) Set up Docker containerization and deployment scripts, 5) Create contributing guidelines and development setup documentation
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Moderate-high complexity due to comprehensive documentation requirements, deployment preparation, and ensuring accuracy across multiple formats.
